task_completion.description: Verify that the activity_opened.png screenshot shows the GCompris Money activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The activity_opened.png screenshot displays the GCompris Money activity interface, which typically includes an item to purchase, a price tag, and selectable coins/bills at the bottom of the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the rounds_completed.png screenshot shows evidence of completing at least 3 rounds in the Money activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rounds_completed.png screenshot displays the Money activity with visual indicators showing progress of at least 3 rounds (e.g., filled progress stars, a score counter, or level advancement indicators).

task_completion.description: Verify that the main_menu_return.png screenshot shows the GCompris main menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main_menu_return.png screenshot displays the GCompris main menu, characterized by various educational category icons (e.g., computer, puzzle, reading, math) and a general navigation interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshots show the actual GCompris graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The images must be actual screenshots of the GCompris application window, not terminal windows, text editors, or web browsers.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshots represent different states of the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The activity_opened.png and rounds_completed.png screenshots must be visually distinct, reflecting the progression of gameplay rather than duplicated images.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to fake the screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible in the screenshots showing image manipulation commands (like ImageMagick or cp) used to generate the required files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GCompris is an educational software suite. The 'Money' activity involves practicing buying items and giving exact payment using coins and bills. The interface typically shows items to buy, a price, and coins/bills at the bottom to click/drag. Progress is usually indicated by a progress bar, stars, or level indicators. The main menu of GCompris features various category icons (e.g., computer, puzzle, reading, math).
